behaviors.description: The content passed to the summary-generation step includes data retrieved from all three sources.
behaviors.justification: Signal rubric: MOCK-MISS=2 (failure is at module handoff collector->aggregator->summary input), REAL-INFRA=0, MOCK-HIDE=1, LLM-DEP=0, MULTI-STEP=0. Total favors Integration. Rejection gate: rejected System/Agentic because behavior text is specifically about "content passed" to generation, not real network behavior or model judgment quality.
behaviors.test_description: Wire real collection/aggregation modules with deterministic fakes for the three source clients; invoke one report run; assert the payload sent into summary-generation contains fields from metrics endpoint, issue tracker, and deployment log together.

behaviors.description: When one data source is unavailable, the report is produced with a `data unavailable` note for that section rather than aborting.
behaviors.justification: Signal rubric: MOCK-MISS=2 (error propagation across source client, assembler, renderer), REAL-INFRA=0 (unavailability can be simulated in-process), MOCK-HIDE=1, LLM-DEP=0, MULTI-STEP=0. Integration is minimum. Rejection gate: rejected System because behavior text does not require real timeout/socket semantics, only graceful degradation output.
behaviors.test_description: Run report pipeline with one source client stubbed to raise an availability error and the other two returning data; assert process completes, includes a `data unavailable` marker for that section, and still produces a deliverable report object.

behaviors.description: The narrative summary accurately represents the key values present in the input data.
behaviors.justification: Signal rubric: MOCK-MISS=1, REAL-INFRA=0, MOCK-HIDE=2 (stubbed model can always pass), LLM-DEP=3 (correctness depends on generation quality), MULTI-STEP=0. Agentic is required. Rejection gate: rejected Integration because behavior text is about semantic accuracy of the narrative, which deterministic fixtures cannot validate against real model behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Use fixed input datasets with known key values and run the real summary model multiple times; score outputs with an assertion rubric (presence/correctness of key metrics, no contradictions, correct trend wording) and require pass rate above threshold to catch drift/regressions.

behaviors.description: A complete report — from data collection through email delivery — reaches the configured recipient's inbox correctly.
behaviors.justification: Signal rubric: MOCK-MISS=2, REAL-INFRA=3 (real email transport/inbox needed), MOCK-HIDE=2, LLM-DEP=0 (this behavior is delivery correctness, not summary quality), MULTI-STEP=0. System is minimum. Rejection gate: rejected Workflow because there is no requirement to validate multiple model decisions; rejected Agentic because success criterion is inbox delivery end-to-end.
behaviors.test_description: Execute the scheduled job in a test environment against reachable source endpoints (or controlled test doubles over real HTTP), send via real email service test account, and verify the configured recipient mailbox receives one correctly addressed report email with expected subject/body structure.

behaviors.description: When the email delivery service is unreachable, the generated report is saved to a local file and delivery is retried on the next scheduled run.
behaviors.justification: Signal rubric: MOCK-MISS=2 (handoff between generator, delivery, persistence, retry state), REAL-INFRA=1 (local filesystem only; no mandatory real network), MOCK-HIDE=1, LLM-DEP=0, MULTI-STEP=0. Integration is minimum. Integration-brake check: (a) no required real OS/network/subprocess boundary; (b) no model-output dependence; (c) no multi-agentic chain. Rejection gate: rejected System because behavior can be validated by wiring modules with a failing mail client stub and real local file persistence in-process.
behaviors.test_description: First run: mail client returns unreachable error; assert report is persisted to fallback file/spool with retry metadata. Second run: mail client succeeds; assert persisted report is picked up and sent, then cleared/marked delivered to prevent duplicate retries.
